Title: Genius
Writer: Kenneth Biller, Noah Pink, Suzan-Lori Parks
Actors: Samantha Colley, Seth Gabel, Antonio Banderas
Plot: The life stories of history's greatest minds, from their days as young adults to their final years: their discoveries, loves, relationships, causes, flaws and genius.
Awards: Won 2 Primetime Emmys. 16 wins & 84 nominations total
